hero.heading: Best Workforce Management Software for Packaging & Fulfillment
hero.subheading: Compare top platforms for managing 50-500 workers

products.name: Deputy
cons: Not built specifically for Packaging & Fulfillment

content.verdict: For Packaging & Fulfillment businesses, Workforce OS is purpose-built with automated crew dispatch, agency elimination, and industry-specific compliance tracking. Generic tools like Deputy and When I Work work for retail/office but lack the features Packaging & Fulfillment companies need to save 60% on staffing costs.
